story_path: string (path to user story analysis JSON)
audit_path: string (path to current reality audit JSON)

architectural_decisions.basis: ADR-NNN, {source}, or Explicit Architectural Change from Story
architectural_decisions.answers_open_question: string (reference to open question from story analysis, if applicable)

questions_addressed.question: What is the maximum length for tactic title?
questions_addressed.justification: To ensure the title is concise and easy to read
questions_addressed.basis: Product Owner's requirement from original story's tech notes

questions_addressed.question: Should search be case-sensitive?
questions_addressed.answer: Yes, search will be case sensitive, on textual fields via a Contains search. Non-text fields will look for exact matches with a starts-with search.
questions_addressed.justification: This limits the need to transform user input data in text fields. And provide consistent behavior from a user perspective.

questions_addressed.question: Should searches be cached?
questions_addressed.answer: Yes, searches will be cached with a 5 min TTL.
questions_addressed.justifications: To improve performance and reduce database load
